title: OCLA Routing Decision V1
description: Records a model routing decision made by the ModelRouter (DIM 3). Emitted for observability, audit, and future OCLA bus integration.

requested_model.description: The model identifier the client originally requested.

routed_model.description: The model identifier after routing (may equal requested_model).

routed_provider.description: Provider the request is re-targeted to. Null when upstream is unchanged.

tier.description: The intent-classified tier that drove the routing decision.

reasoning.description: Human-readable, deterministic explanation of the classification path.

model_changed.description: Whether the routing decision actually swapped the model.

estimated_cost_ratio.description: Estimated cost ratio (routed/original). Null when either model cost is unknown.
